title: Incorrect Node Deletion in Binary Tree

statement.markdown: Implement the `deleteNode` function for a binary tree where you have to delete a node with a given value. The function should update the tree with the minimum possible height. You will be given a root node and a target value to delete. Write the function to perform the deletion. The tree nodes have a `node` class with `val`, `left`, and `right` properties.
statement.inputFormat: The function receives a root node and a target value as input.
statement.outputFormat: The function should return the root node of the updated tree.

examples.input: Example input (matching the stdin format that main wrapper expects)

functionSignature.python: def deleteNode(self, root: Optional[TreeNode], value: int) -> Optional[TreeNode]:

solutions.python:
class Solution:
   def deleteNode(self, root: Optional[TreeNode], value: int) -> Optional[TreeNode]:
      第一一的方式化一口我的子的成功司
      if not root:
         return None
      if value < root.val:
         root.left = self.deleteNode(root.left, value)
      elif value > root.val:
         root.right = self.deleteNode(root.right, value)
      else:
         # handle root node deletion
         if root.left:
            root.val = root.left.val
            root.right = root.left.right
            root.left = root.left.left
         elif root.right:
            root.val = root.right.val
            root.left = root.right.left
            root.right = root.right.right
         else:
            return None
      return root

def deleteTree(root):
   return root is None
# Driver code
root = TreeNode(5)
root.left = TreeNode(3)
root.right = TreeNode(6)
root.left.left = TreeNode(2)
root.left.right = TreeNode(4)
root.right.right = TreeNode(7)
root.right.right.right = TreeNode(8)
ans = Solution().deleteNode(root, 3)
deletedTree = deleteTree(ans)
print("Deleted Tree:")
self.printTree(deletedTree)


# Helper function to print tree inorder
def printTree(root):
   if root:
      print(root.val, end=" ")
      self.printTree(root.left)
      self.printTree(root.right)


# Main Code
if __name__ == '__main__':
   deleteTree(root)
   print("Deleted Tree:")
   self.printTree(ans)

testCases.input: First line count, second line elements (stdin match)
